zh.lifeSummary: 當Mayor Alfonso de Meneses於1230年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德蒙特亞利格 德 甘波斯時，她的父親Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses28歲，母親María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira41歲。她於1246年與Alfonso De Molina在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈瓜亞達拉亞拉摩里納 德 阿拉格昂結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1265年在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德蒙特亞利格 德 甘波斯蒙特亞利格享年35歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德瓦拉阿多利德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mayor Alfonso de Meneses于1230年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德蒙特亞利格 德 甘波斯时，她的父亲Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses28岁，母亲María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira41岁。她于1246年与Alfonso De Molina在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈瓜亞達拉亞拉摩里納 德 阿拉格昂结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1265年在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德蒙特亞利格 德 甘波斯蒙特亞利格享年35岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德瓦拉阿多利德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meneses
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jorge, Francisco, Mario, Juan, Orlando, Alejandro, Arturo, Benigno.  Portuguese Joao, Mateus, Henrique, Joaquim, Ligia.
Spanish and Portuguese: habitational name from either of two places called Meneses de Campos in Palencia and Castile, Spain.

variants.name: Menezes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Luiz, Marcos, Sergio, Alberto, Antero, Eduardo, Adelino, Alda, Ana, Ana Maria.  Portuguese Ademir, Almir, Guilherme, Marcio, Paulo.  Indian Geetha, Jeevan, Naresh, Rahul, Rohit, Shalini, Vinod, Vivek.
Portuguese and Spanish: variant of   Meneses  . This surname is also found in western India and in East Timor, to which it was brought by Portuguese colonists in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mayor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Pedro, Agapito, Alberto, Cesar, Cosme, Javier, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Manuel, Orlando.
Spanish: nickname for an older man or a distinguishing epithet for the elder of two bearers of the same personal name, from mayor ‘older’, from Latin maior (natus), literally ‘greater (by birth)’.

variants.name: Morgado
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Abilio, Acacio, Armando, Mario, Edmundo, Eduardo, Miguel, Adolfo, Alejandra.  Portuguese Henrique.
Portuguese and Spanish: distinguishing name for the eldest son of a family, from Portuguese morgado ‘first-born, heir’, Late Latin maioricatus, a derivative of maior (see Mayor 2).

variants.name: Mayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Franz, Helmut, Wilhelm, Erwin, Gerhard, Heinz, Ilse, Lorenz, Wolfgang.

English (Staffordshire): post-medieval form of Mear, which is either a topographic name, from Middle English mere ‘pond, pool’ (Old English mere) or Middle English mere ‘boundary’ (Old English (ge)mǣre), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places with names derived from these terms, such as Mere (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Wiltshire), Meir in Caverswall (Staffordshire), and Meare (Somerset).
English: occupational name for a physician, from Old French mire, Middle English mire, meir, meyre, originally synonymous with Myer .

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

en.lifeSummary: When Mayor Alfonso de Meneses was born in 1230, in Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain, her father, Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses, was 28 and her mother, María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira, was 41. She married Alfonso De Molina in 1246, in Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1265, in Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 35, and was buried in Valladolid, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mayor Alfonso de Meneses est née en 1230, à Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses, avait 28 ans et sa mère, María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Alfonso De Molina en 1246, à Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1265, à Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Valladolid, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mayor Alfonso de Meneses 1230 in Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses 28 und ihre Mutter María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira 41. Sie hat 1246 in Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Alfonso De Molina geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1265 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Valladolid, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mayor Alfonso de Meneses è nata il nel 1230 nel Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna, sua padre, Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Alfonso De Molina nel 1246, nel Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1265, nel Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Valladolid, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Mayor Alfonso de Menesesが1230年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドモンテアレグア ド カンプオスで生まれた時，父Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Menesesは28歳，母María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeiraは41歳であった。1246年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャグアダラジャラモライナ ド アラグoンでAlfonso De Molinaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1265年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドモンテアレグア ド カンプオスモンテアレグアで35歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドヴァラドリドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mayor Alfonso de Meneses(이)가 1230년 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 발라도리드 몽올그르 데 캄푸스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1246년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 구아다라자라 모리나 데 아라그o에서 Alfonso De Molina(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 발라도리드 몽올그르 데 캄푸스 몽올그르에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 발라도리드 발라도리드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mayor Alfonso de Meneses nasceu em 1230, em Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Alfonso De Molina em 1246, em Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1265, em Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Valladolid, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mayor Alfonso de Meneses родилась в 1230 г. в местности монтилегр де кампос, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alfonso De Molina в 1246 г. в местности молаина де арагoн, гуадаладжара, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1265 г. в местности монтилегр, монтилегр де кампос, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности валладолид, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mayor Alfonso de Meneses nació en 1230, en Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses, tenía 28 años y su mamá, María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Alfonso De Molina en 1246, en Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1265, en Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Valladolid, Valladolid, Castilla y León, España.
